title: FasterRCNN + MaskRCNN: implement RoIHeads postprocess (box decode + per-class NMS + mask postprocess)
description:
Surfaced by #1139. FasterRcnn::forward in ferrotorch-vision/src/models/detection/faster_rcnn.rs literally discards box_deltas at line ~408 ('let (class_logits, _box_deltas) = self.head.forward(&roi_tensor)?;'), returns RPN proposals as 'boxes', and skips per-class NMS / score-threshold / detections-per-image cap entirely. MaskRCNN inherits this and additionally returns per-proposal per-class mask logits without sigmoid / class selection / paste-back to image.

THIS IS A PRODUCTION CORRECTNESS BUG: users calling vision::get_model('fasterrcnn_resnet50_fpn', true, 91).forward(...) get garbage detections (RPN proposals with raw classifier scores).

Acceptance:
- FasterRCNN: implement BoxCoder.decode (probably needs new BoxCoder type) → per-class score-threshold → per-class NMS → detections-per-image cap. Match torchvision's RoIHeads.postprocess.
- MaskRCNN: implement mask sigmoid + class selection + paste-back-to-original-image-resolution.
- Re-run #1139 verification harness; both must PASS.
- Discriminating tests for box decode, NMS, mask postprocess.

Estimated scope: ~1000-1500 LoC. Substantial dispatch.

Confidence: HIGH on diagnosis. The entire postprocess pipeline is missing — not a numerical bug.
